General.Name: The Generation Essentials Group
General.Description: The Generation Essentials Group, a media and entertainment company, engages in fashion, arts, lifestyle, cultural, entertainment, as well as F&B businesses worldwide. It operates through three segments: Media and entertainment; Hotel operation, hospitality and VIP services; and The strategic investment. The company publishes print publications and digital contents, including L'Officiel, The Art Newspaper, and DigFin. It also produces and invests in movies; holds premium building properties; and provides hospitality services in Hong Kong and Singapore, as well as operates IP extended business in the areas of F&B. In addition, the company hosts a multitude of cultural events, as well as conducts strategic investment business and hold equity investment in two major Chinese regional banks. The Generation Essentials Group was founded in 2022 and is based in Paris, France.

2.Title: Global Editor-In-Chief of The Art Newspaper
